title: Sunteck Realty is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Sunteck Realty is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Sunteck Realty. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Property Advisor to strengthen our Vadodara-based team.

About Sunteck Realty:
Sunteck Realty is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sunteck Realty!
